query: I just ran `npm create vite@latest my-app -- --template react` to bootstrap a new project. Should I have pinned the scaffolder version?
expected_behavior: Does NOT flag the `npm create vite@latest` invocation as a pinning violation requiring remediation
Explains that `npm create *@latest` (or similar `create-*` scaffolders) are one-shot project bootstrappers, not runtime dependencies, so the `@latest` is acceptable here
Recommends instead that the user pin the RESULTING dependencies in the new project's package.json (or commit the package-lock.json for CI to consume via `npm ci`)
